title: Slow Clients, Resource Limits, Backpressure, Admission, and Cleanup · Program Defense
summary: A security review compares near-miss parser decisions for slow clients, resource limits, backpressure, admission, and cleanup and requires the smallest strict connection resource budget and overload policy with changed-input evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for connection resource budget and overload policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound start-line, header, content, trailer, idle, and total-phase time using both progress and absolute budgets.
Bound per-connection buffers, retained slices, field maps, content queues, trailer data, and pooled-object capacity before allocation.
Propagate slow peer writes through bounded queues, cancellation, deadlines, partial output evidence, and producer shutdown.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Slow Header Body Defense · changed case · Quiz Slow Header Body Defense
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz protocol team handles case 6764 in a incident replay lab retaining minimized request-smuggling corpora. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine absolute phase time, memory, and output-queue budgets for slow-peer defense; preserve this operating constraint: one parser state transition may consume bytes only after its full precondition holds; then append a second pipelined message and prove the first parser leaves the exact residual bytes. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Bound start-line, header, content, trailer, idle, and total-phase time using both progress and absolute budgets.

Which action demonstrates Slow Header Body Defense without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Slow Header Body Defense · changed case · Quiz Slow Header Body Defense.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for bound start-line, header, content, trailer, idle, and total-phase time using both progress and absolute budgets. For Slow Header Body Defense · changed case · Quiz Slow Header Body Defense, keep Slow Header Body Defense connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
